product.name: ArWoWear T0 Flame Arc Pro
product.familyDescriptorPl: Trudnopalne z ochroną przed łukiem elektrycznym
product.categorySourceGroup: Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Vat Dyed, Workwear Fabrics Resistant up to 100 Wash
product.titleDescriptor: 99% Cotton 1% Carbon Plain, Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric, 150 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 150 g/m², 99% Cotton 1% Carbon, VAT Dyed, Flame Retardant (100 Wash Resistant), Antistatic, 1/1 Plain Fabric
descriptions: ArWoWear T0 Flame Arc Pro is 150 gr/m', 99% cotton 1% Carbon, vat dyed, flame retardant, antistatic shirt fabric.
It has flame retardant function with EN ISO 11612 certification.
Due to carbon fibers used on the back side of the fabric it has antistatic certification. (EN 1149-5)
It is durable up to 100 washing.
99% Cotton 1% Carbon Plain, Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric, 150 gr/m'2
150 g/m², 99% Cotton 1% Carbon, VAT Dyed, Flame Retardant (100 Wash Resistant), Antistatic, 1/1 Plain Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Product has EN 1149 antistatic and FR properties suitable for electric-arc adjacent risks, but no explicit statement of electrical utility, high-voltage or energy-sector use is provided.
FR cotton/antistatic fabric could suit metalworking environments, but no explicit welding, foundry or molten-metal use is stated.

modelOutput.noMatchReason: This is a generic flame-retardant, antistatic FR shirt fabric (EN ISO 11612, EN ISO 14116, EN 1149) marketed as workwear fabric with no explicit sector (military, firefighting, energy, welding, etc.) named in the product data.
